description: `between` requires numbers together or words together; a boolean value raises `ol-type` naming the concept "number or word" (spec/execution-model.md:146-166, error-model.md `ol-type`) — the `operation` param reads "between" (not an ordering-operator symbol) so the diagnostic names the form the learner actually wrote. Execution halts, so only the `instruction` event is kept. Issue #99.
